## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential engagement for fwd.digital to provide AI-powered content creation services for Trunk.](https://fathom.video/share/w-Nx3efhp7RyyozgAXdMFExvJk8ant4C?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital has developed AI workflows to rapidly generate high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/w-Nx3efhp7RyyozgAXdMFExvJk8ant4C?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Their approach involves AI content generation with human expert review/editing](https://fathom.video/share/w-Nx3efhp7RyyozgAXdMFExvJk8ant4C?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Pricing is $9k/month for 3 months, aiming to deliver \~100k words/month once ramped up](https://fathom.video/share/w-Nx3efhp7RyyozgAXdMFExvJk8ant4C?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Trunk has some concerns around technical content quality but is interested in exploring further](https://fathom.video/share/w-Nx3efhp7RyyozgAXdMFExvJk8ant4C?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's AI Content Approach

  - [Leverage AI to generate drafts, with human experts reviewing/editing for quality](https://fathom.video/share/w-Nx3efhp7RyyozgAXdMFExvJk8ant4C?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Extensive workflows to adapt content to client's voice, cross-link, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/w-Nx3efhp7RyyozgAXdMFExvJk8ant4C?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Claim 10x cheaper than hiring writers while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/w-Nx3efhp7RyyozgAXdMFExvJk8ant4C?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Have published over 4,000 pages for clients so far with strong growth](https://fathom.video/share/w-Nx3efhp7RyyozgAXdMFExvJk8ant4C?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

### Trunk's Needs & Concerns

  - [Want to increase content output but ensure technical accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/w-Nx3efhp7RyyozgAXdMFExvJk8ant4C?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [Small marketing team with dev rel engineers currently creating content](https://fathom.video/share/w-Nx3efhp7RyyozgAXdMFExvJk8ant4C?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Concerned about quality tradeoffs with AI for technical audiences](https://fathom.video/share/w-Nx3efhp7RyyozgAXdMFExvJk8ant4C?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Interested but $9k/month is a significant investment to consider](https://fathom.video/share/w-Nx3efhp7RyyozgAXdMFExvJk8ant4C?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Conner to discuss with Trunk founders and likely request deeper technical content quality assessment](https://fathom.video/share/w-Nx3efhp7RyyozgAXdMFExvJk8ant4C?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [Set up meeting same week if founders want to proceed to discuss and potentially close deal](https://fathom.video/share/w-Nx3efhp7RyyozgAXdMFExvJk8ant4C?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [Marcel to create Slack channel to facilitate easy communication](https://fathom.video/share/w-Nx3efhp7RyyozgAXdMFExvJk8ant4C?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
